niche: senior downsizing and move prep service

pattern.imageEvidence: consultant helping older adult sort keepsakes and moving boxes
pattern.styleContract: Gentle practical trust with family-support proof, real keepsake sorting evidence, small warm action accents, and a story checklist as the signature move.

tagline: Move prep with patience, labels, and breathing room.

hero.title: KindMove senior downsizing move prep hero image
hero.alt: A downsizing consultant sitting with an older adult at a dining table, sorting photo albums, keepsake boxes, packing paper, and labeled moving boxes in a calm home.

contact.serviceArea: Senior downsizing consults, room-by-room sorting, family decision support, donation planning, packing prep, move labels, keepsake organization, and gentle transition help for apartments, condos, family homes, and retirement communities

copy.eyebrow: Senior downsizing with patient sorting help
copy.heroTitle: A smaller home should not mean a rushed goodbye.
copy.heroText: KindMove helps families sort, label, donate, pack, and plan the next chapter with steady hands, clear categories, and room for the stories that come with the boxes.
copy.introTitle: Support for decisions, keepsakes, donations, and the hard maybe pile.
copy.introText: We help define what stays, what moves, what gets shared, what needs family input, and what should wait until everyone has had a breath.
copy.quoteText: Send the move timeline, rooms involved, family decision needs, and what feels most sensitive. We will suggest a first consult path without pushing a giant package.

services.title: Room Sorting Sessions
services.text: Supportive room-by-room help for keep, gift, donate, sell, pack, and undecided items with labels that make sense later.

services.title: Family Decision Prep
services.text: Shared notes, photo lists, keepsake grouping, and simple prompts so family members can weigh in without slowing every box.

services.title: Move-Ready Labeling
services.text: Packing prep, priority boxes, donation staging, mover notes, and first-week essentials grouped for the new home.

process.title: Talk through the timeline
process.text: We start with the move date, family support, sensitive areas, and which rooms need the gentlest pace.

process.title: Sort in small passes
process.text: Sessions focus on one zone at a time so decisions stay clear and the maybe pile does not take over.

process.title: Prepare the handoff
process.text: Donation, packing, family pickup, mover labels, and first-week boxes get staged with plain notes.

proof.label: essentials staged for the new home

notes: Works: a story checklist. gives the page a memorable shape.
Proof: consultant helping older adult sort keepsakes and moving boxes. anchors the niche in the first viewport.
Action: Schedule a consult is the main conversion path.

brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic checklist-urgency recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.turnaround: One room: focused sessions reduce overwhelm.
serviceDetails.whatToSend: Send the move timeline, rooms involved, family decision needs, and what feels most sensitive. We will suggest a first consult path without pushing a giant package.
serviceDetails.prepNote: We start with the move date, family support, sensitive areas, and which rooms need the gentlest pace.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: consult first for Senior downsizing consults, room-by-room sorting, family decision support, donation planning, packing prep, move labels, keepsake organization, and gentle transition help for apartments, condos, family homes, and retirement communities.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: Scope, access, timing, and fit are confirmed before booking so the next step is clear and low-pressure.
